title: leontodon subincanus
intro: Leontodon subincanus, also known as the Lesser Hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Leontodon subincanus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and address various health concerns.
